# Other Methods

**Path:** `other_methods`

LPR methods centered on a distinct research dimension not adequately represented by the stable categories above.

## Scope

**Include:** cross-source recognition; uncertainty-aware recognition; lifelong memory

**Exclude:** method that fits an existing category but uses an unusual backbone
